idea-plugin.name: TOON Language
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation) files. Features:
  • Syntax highlighting
  • Error diagnostics with recovery
  • Hover information
  • Completion (keys, literals)
  • Go to definition
  • Find references
  • Rename symbol (with prepare)
  • Document formatting
  • Document symbols (outline)
  • Workspace symbols
  • Code actions and code lens
  • Document highlight, links, and folding ranges
  • Inlay hints and linked editing ranges
  • Selection ranges and semantic tokens
TOON is a compact, human-readable encoding of the JSON data model, designed for LLM prompts and structured data interchange.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.4.0

  • Full LSP capability set: code actions, code lens, document highlight/link, folding, inlay hints, linked editing, selection ranges, workspace symbols, semantic tokens
  • Updated to IntelliJ 2024.2 / LSP4IJ 0.20.1

0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • Full LSP support via bundled toon-lsp binary
  • TextMate-based syntax highlighting

server.name: TOON Language Server
server.description: Language server for TOON files providing diagnostics with recovery, hover, completion, definition, references, rename, formatting, code actions, code lens, document highlight/link, folding, inlay hints, linked editing, selection ranges, workspace and document symbols, and semantic tokens.
